name: Parmesan Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, dissolve yeast in warm water.
2. Add milk, grated Parmesan cheese, melted butter, sugar, salt, cornmeal, and eggs; mix well.
3. Gradually add 3 cups of flour and beat until smooth.
4. Turn dough onto a floured board and knead until smooth and elastic, about 6-8 minutes.
5. Place in a greased bowl, turning once to grease the top. Cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled, about 1 hour.
6. Punch dough down. Shape into 24 ovals.
7. Dip each oval into melted butter and grated Parmesan cheese.
8. Place rolls on greased baking sheets. Cover and let rise until doubled, about 30 minutes.
9. Bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from pans to cool on wire racks.
